title: Transgression Speaks to Wicked Man

verses.text: He views himself with flattery, And sinfulness denies. He thinks his sin cannot be found and cannot be despised.
Your mercy and your truth, O Lord, Transcend the lofty sky; Your righteousness, like mountains high; Your judgements, deep and wide.
The fountain of eternal life With you alone abides. Within the brightness of your light We see the light of life.
